name: liangify
description: Michael Liang's personal Claude Code customizations — agents, commands, skills, and hooks shared across projects.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Core agents, commands, skills, and hooks for Michael Liang's personal projects.

plugins.name: typescript
plugins.description: TypeScript language style — strict typing, narrowing, discriminated unions, branded types, generics. Framework-agnostic. Depends on `core`.

plugins.name: angular
plugins.description: Angular (17+) skills — modern patterns, RxJS, reactive forms, Jasmine/Karma testing. Depends on `core` and `typescript`.
